provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Special Economic Zones Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: Part II Establishment and Functions of Special Economic Zones Authority
provisions.title: Establishment of Authority
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of Authority
(1) There is hereby established a body to be known as the Special Economic Zones Authority.
(2) The Authority shall be a body corporate with full capacity to sue or be sued in its own name, and to do all such things as bodies corporate may, by law, do and as may be necessary or incidental to the exercise of its powers and the performance of its functions under this Act.

provisions.chapter: Part II Establishment and Functions of Special Economic Zones Authority
provisions.title: Objectives of Authority

provisions.chapter: Part II Establishment and Functions of Special Economic Zones Authority
provisions.title: Functions and powers of Authority

provisions.chapter: Part II Establishment and Functions of Special Economic Zones Authority
provisions.title: Seal of Authority
provisions.content:
6. Seal of Authority
(1) The seal of the Authority shall be such device as may be determined by the Board and shall be kept by the Chief Executive or the Board Secretary.
(2) The affixing of the seal shall be authenticated by the Chairperson or any other person authorised in that regard by a resolution of the Board.
(3) Any contract or instrument which, if entered into or executed by a person not being a body corporate would not be required to be under seal, may be entered into or executed without seal on behalf of the Authority by the Chairperson or any other person authorised by the Board to do so.

provisions.chapter: Part II Establishment and Functions of Special Economic Zones Authority
provisions.title: Board of Authority

definitions.definition: an officer authorised by the Commissioner General to administer customs matters in the special economic zones
the Special Economic Zones Authority established under section 3
the Special Economic Zones Board of the Authority established under section 7
an investor with right over land in a special economic zone held for purposes of development of special economic zones infrastructure
the revitalisation of distressed urban or rural areas through the provision of tax incentives and financial grants
an industrial estate aimed primarily at foreign markets
activities including tourism and retail sales, permit on-site residence, and providing a broader set of incentives and benefits
a person licensed by the relevant licensing authority to carry on business in a special economic zone
a permit granted by the Authority pursuant to the provisions of section 31 to conduct business transactions in a particular special economic zone
schemes providing incentives to individual enterprises regardless of location and in which factories do not have to locate within a designated zone to receive incentives and privileges
an area of land established as such under section 29
science or technology parks, petrochemical zones, logistics parks or airport-based zones
a company registered under the Companies Act (Cap 42:01) and subcontracted by the developer to manage a special economic zone.
